utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Good for you ! And hey , I thought your paper on punctuated equilibrium in the Devonian era was top notch !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I just wanted to let you know I have changed my mind : I am gonna do it , I am gonna kiss Joey .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I am gonna do it , I am gonna kiss Joey .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , you can not ! Friends hooking up is a bad idea .

emotion_cause.span: 6_Friends hooking up is a bad idea .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Please , what about you and Chandler ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_you can not ! Friends hooking up is a bad idea .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That is different ! I was drunk and stupid !

emotion_cause.span: 8_That is different ! I was drunk and stupid !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: What about all the guys that you have got the phone numbers from ? Why do not you just kiss one of them ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I could , I could but I do not want to ! I want to kiss Joey !

emotion_cause.span: 10_Why do not you just kiss one of them

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right . I think it is a big mistake but it is your decision .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And I can not stop you ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey Rach , have you seen Charlie anywhere ?
